reference: Hi Sir, welcome to HCG. I understand your problem; it may be a viral fever. There is no need to worry. Please follow the treatment: take Dolo six hundred and fifty milligrams after breakfast, after lunch, and after dinner. Also, take Extracef Plus two hundred milligrams after breakfast and after dinner for a five-day course. I hope you are satisfied with my answer. Thank you.
text: Hi sir, welcome to HCT. I understand your problem. It may be a viral fever. There is no need to worry. Please follow the treatment: take Dolo six hundred and fifty milligrams after breakfast, after lunch, and after dinner. Also, take X-ray plus two hundred milligrams after breakfast, after dinner, for a five-day course. Hope you are satisfied with the answer. Thank you.
